name: Veal Stock
recipeIngredient: 2 bulbs garlic, cut in half crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Place the veal bones, carrots, onions, leeks, celery, parsley, bay leaves, thyme, and garlic on a flat baking sheet.
3. Roast for 30 to 45 minutes, or until all sides are dark brown.
4. Remove the veal bones and set them aside.
5. Spread tomato paste over the roasted vegetables.
6. Return the vegetables to the oven and roast for an additional 30 minutes, or until the tomato paste is very dark brown.
7. Add the roasted veal bones and vegetables to a large stockpot.
8. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
9. Skim any foam from the surface.
10. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 12 to 16 hours, or until the liquid is reduced by half.
11. Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into another clean pot or container.
